flow_steps.description: Sign-in page — enter user name/email and password

actions.selector: input[autocomplete='username'], input[type='email'], input[placeholder*='User'], input[placeholder*='Email'], input[aria-label*='User'], input[aria-label*='Email'], input[name*='user'], input[name*='email'], input[id*='user'], input[id*='email'], input:not([type='password']):visible
input[type='password'], input[autocomplete='current-password'], input[placeholder*='Password'], input[aria-label*='Password'], input[name*='password'], input[id*='password']
button:has-text('Sign In'), button:text-is('Sign In'), button[type='submit'], input[type='submit'][value='Sign In']
actions.description: Click Sign In on the login page

flow_steps.description: OTP page — wait for manual OTP entry and post-login redirect

actions.description: User enters OTP manually and clicks Sign In
actions.instructions: When the OTP screen appears, enter the OTP manually in the browser and click Sign In. The scan will resume automatically after the dashboard loads.

flow_steps.description: Explore all reachable routes after login via LLM-guided routing

actions.description: Explore menus, tabs, cards, charts, detail pages, modals, and every reachable dashboard route
